name: claw-web-bridge
description: Push current editor state (open files, selection, cursor) to a Claw Web instance so agents can see what you're working on.

clawWebBridge.endpoint.description: Base URL of the Claw Web server (no trailing slash).

clawWebBridge.authToken.description: Bearer token for the Claw Web server (set in Settings → Access if auth is enabled).

clawWebBridge.enabled.description: Enable pushing editor state to Claw Web.

clawWebBridge.includeSelectionText.description: Include the selected text (up to 64KB) with each push.

commands.title: Claw Web: Push editor state now
